name: Pool 2D - Poolians
short_description: Pool 2D is a free pool game including 8-ball,9-ball,15-ball,3-ball,rotation and blackjack. The graphics are spectacular and the physics are realistic and accurate. Whether you play against the computer or against real players from all over the world online, the action is smooth and fast paced!
detailed_description:
Pool 2D is a free pool game with an active community. The graphics are spectacular and the physics are realistic and accurate. Whether you play against the computer or against real players from all over the world online, the action is smooth and fast paced!

Features

Very realistic pool and billiard physics

Play against the computer with different difficulty levels

Play against players from all over the world

Allows curve and masse shots and full english shots

View your statistics and achievements

Unlimited hours of fun

Popular 8-Ball Pool

Premium Features
9-Ball, Rotation, Straight, Rotation, Blackjack, Killer and more!

supported_languages: English, French, German, Spanish - Spain, Japanese, Korean, Polish, Portuguese - Portugal, Portuguese - Brazil, Romanian, Russian, Simplified Chinese, Spanish - Latin America, Traditional Chinese, Turkish, Vietnamese

reviews.review_text: Very cool game! Realistic gameplay and AI is very challenging!
Bug when i hover any ball and bot/player gets a foul and i can hold the ball then it kinda like just keeps showing the balltype even when not hovering and it disapears after like 4 seconds.
